inputs.label: Sale Price (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Sale price of the relinquished property.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sale price of the relinquished property.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix de vente du bien cédé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de venta de la propiedad cedida.

inputs.label: Remaining Debt (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Remaining mortgage balance on the relinquished property.

businessContext_i18n.en: Remaining mortgage balance on the relinquished property.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Solde hypothécaire restant sur le bien cédé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Saldo restante de la hipoteca de la propiedad cedida.
businessContext_i18n.ar: رصيد الرهن العقاري المتبقي على العقار المتنازل عنه.

inputs.label: New Investment (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of the replacement property.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of the replacement property.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total du bien de remplacement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total de la propiedad de reemplazo.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

formulas.totalBoot: Math.max(0, (salePrice - remainingDebt) - newInvestment) + Math.max(0, remainingDebt - newInvestment)

suggestedActions: Verify inputs before making financial decisions.
Consult a licensed financial advisor for personalized advice.

description.short: Calculate taxable cash-out amount in a 1031 like-kind exchange for real estate.
description.long: Calculate taxable cash-out amount in a 1031 like-kind exchange for real estate.

short_i18n.en: Calculate taxable cash-out amount in a 1031 like-kind exchange for real estate.
short_i18n.tr: Gayrimenkul satisinda 1031 takasinda vergiye tabi nakit cikisini hesaplar.

long_i18n.en: Calculate taxable cash-out amount in a 1031 like-kind exchange for real estate.
